hero.description: Stunning design, powerful performance, and measurable results. We are Digilevate, your partners in digital growth and online success.

ai_automation.description: We help SMEs eliminate repetitive tasks and revolutionize customer service through cutting-edge AI technologies.
ai_automation.cta_description: Let's analyze together which processes in your company can be optimized by AI.
ai_automation.use_case_1_desc: 24/7 customer advice and lead qualification on your website.
ai_automation.use_case_2_desc: Automated data processing and workflow optimization for SMEs.
ai_automation.use_case_3_desc: Automated appointment bookings and resource management.

core_services_section.description: Discover how we advance your business digitally.
core_services_section.service1_description: We create unique, intuitive designs that perfectly represent your brand and convert visitors into customers.
core_services_section.service2_description: With modern technologies like React, we build fast, secure, and scalable websites that function flawlessly on all devices.
core_services_section.service3_description: We ensure your website is found by potential customers in Zurich and the surrounding area on Google for measurable success.
core_services_section.service4_description: Even after launch, we are there for you. We keep your website technically up-to-date, secure, and powerful.

services_section.description: We develop high-performance websites, optimize your digital visibility, and implement intelligent AI automations providing everything you need for a competitive digital edge.

unified_expertise.meta_description: Digilevate offers professional web development, SEO and AI automation in Zurich. We create high-performance websites and intelligent AI solutions for SMEs.

portfolio_section.description: Explore our portfolio of successful projects. Each website is crafted with precision, designed for performance, and built to convert visitors into customers.

massagenatelier.title: Massagenatelier
massagenatelier.description: Comprehensive optimization of the existing web presence. Through targeted SEO and a fresh design with Squarespace, we were able to significantly increase online visibility and improve the user experience.

degagarage.title: Dega Garage
degagarage.description: Complete new development of the web presence for a garage. With React and Supabase, a high-performance and scalable solution was created that efficiently manages customer inquiries and strengthens brand trust.

collina_chocolates.title: Collina Chocolates
collina_chocolates.description: An elegant online store for handmade chocolates. Implemented with React and Supabase for robust data management. The system offers seamless email order processing and a modern design that highlights the premium quality of the products.

physiosteo_montagna.title: Physiosteo Montagna
physiosteo_montagna.description: A modern and professional website for a physical therapy and osteopathy practice. The website clearly presents its services, team, and philosophy. Focus on personalized and holistic treatment.

personal_portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
personal_portfolio.description: An elegant portfolio for a software developer. It presents skills and experiences in a clean way. The website serves as a digital resume and proof of technological passion.

about_section.description: Two passionate tech entrepreneurs on a mission to help businesses succeed in the digital world.
about_section.why_description1: We founded Digilevate to help SMEs reach their full potential. Many great companies lose customers through outdated websites and a lack of visibility.
about_section.why_description2: Our passion is to merge cutting-edge technology with strategic design. We create digital platforms that deliver measurable results and present your brand in the best light.
about_section.list_item1: Proven Expertise: Combined experience from demanding projects at Google and Swisscom.
about_section.list_item2: At the Forefront: Experts in the latest technologies & AI.
about_section.list_item3: Individual Solutions: Each project is unique and tailored to your goals.

founder_profile.loris_description: As Strategy & Growth Director, Loris is the strategic mind of Digilevate. He lead the company's vision and growth while being actively involved in development.
founder_profile.alessio_description: As Creative Development Director, Alessio lead the creative and technological implementation of our projects. He specializes in merging design with modern code.

testimonials_section.description: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what our clients have to say about working with Digilevate.

sandrine_montagna.name: Sandrine Montagna
sandrine_montagna.content: Excellent service! Loris and his team handled the complete redesign of our website, which is modern, clear, and perfectly tailored to our needs.

ilija_predogac.name: Ilija Predogac
ilija_predogac.content: Very professional and elegant team and above all, Loris convinced me with his advice. He was able to tell me exactly what I needed and what was necessary to improve my website. Would work with them again and again.

juliana_jevtic.name: Juliana Jevtic
juliana_jevtic.content: I think the price-performance ratio is great. They were also able to competently implement my more complex requests and offer me additional options that I hadn't thought of myself. Highly recommended and would consider these guys again for future projects. Great work!

contact_section.description: Let's discuss your project and create something amazing together. Get your free consultation today.
contact_section.project_details_placeholder: Tell us about your project, goals, and any specific requirements...

footer.description: Elevating your digital presence through beautiful design and robust technology.
